# Switch-like custom control structure with multiple captured parts.

DUP ( X[1] -- X[1] X[1] )
2DROP ( X[2] X[1] -- )
DROP ( X -- )
: parse word define colon ( -- )
; control end ( -- )
literal integer ( -- n )
SWITCH control switch ( n -- )
OF control of ( -- )
DEFAULT control default ( -- )
ENDSWITCH control endswitch ( -- )

syntax:
  SWITCH <selector>
  OF <first branch>
  OF <second branch>
  [DEFAULT <default branch>]
  ENDSWITCH
  effect:
    <selector>
    SWITCH
    either <first branch> <second branch> <default branch>
